title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 393.356 - No modification or elimination of special rate under section 393.355
text:
393.356.  No modification or elimination of special rate under section 393.355. — If the commission approves a special rate under section 393.355, the commission shall lack the authority to modify or eliminate any such rate during the specified term subject to conditions established under section 393.355.
(L. 2017 1st Ex. Sess. H.B. 1)
Effective 6-14-17
